basic_details.job_title: IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Manager, Senior Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Ranchi (IIM Ranchi)
basic_details.post_name: Corporate Relation Manager, Assistant Manager (Corporate Relations Office), Senior Associate (Corporate Relations Office), Clinical Psychologist
basic_details.short_information: Candidates with MBA or equivalent, Post-Graduation, M.Phil / M.A. in Clinical Psychology qualification and maximum age limit of 50 years are eligible to apply for these Various Posts vacancies. The online application process for IIM Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 has started on 04 May 2026 and will remain open until 25 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: MBA or equivalent, Post-Graduation, M.Phil / M.A. in Clinical Psychology
qualification.details: Corporate Relation Manager: MBA or equivalent with 55% marks; Minimum 6 years of experience in placement services, career services, B2B sales, business development, or corporate relations. Assistant Manager (Corporate Relations Office): MBA or equivalent with 55% marks; Minimum 3 years of experience in placement services, career services, B2B sales, business development, or corporate relations. Senior Associate (Corporate Relations Office): Post-Graduation or equivalent with minimum 55% marks; 03 years of relevant work experience in Placement/Corporate Relations office of an educational institution or 03 years of work experience in sales/marketing domain. Clinical Psychologist: M.Phil / M.A. in Clinical Psychology from a recognised University/Institute; Valid current registration with Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) as Clinical Psychologist.

salary_details.details: Corporate Relation Manager: Consolidated salary equivalent to Pay level 10 Assistant Manager (for Corporate Relations Office): Consolidated salary equivalent to Pay level 08 Senior Associate (for Corporate Relations Office): Consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month (Gross) Clinical Psychologist: Consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month (Gross)

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Interview Written Test (if required)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIM Ranchi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Ranchi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 is 25 May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Corporate Relation Manager, Assistant Manager, Senior Associate, and Clinical Psychologist.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the posts in IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for all the posts in IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 65,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Corporate Relation Manager post?
faq.answer: For the Corporate Relation Manager post, candidates must possess an MBA or equivalent degree with a minimum of 55% marks and have at least 6 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for applying to IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 is 50 years. Age relaxation will be applicable as per the Government of India rules for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an interview. A written test may also be conducted if deemed necessary by the institute.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Jharkhand apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Jharkhand. However, it is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific state domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job in IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The job type for the posts in IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 is on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification for IIM Ranchi Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
